name: rox-mesh-relay-watcher
description: Mesh relay-watcher (D5): the SERVER-ESCROW inbound bridge. Subscribes the Nostr relay pool, receives NIP-17 gift-wrapped DMs (kind 1059) addressed to the server-held escrow pubkey, unwraps them server-side with the escrow private key (loaded from Infisical/env — mesh is a transport-fallback bridge, NOT E2E-private), and relays each plaintext as a signed POST to /api/mesh/inbound. STANDALONE — not part of the Rox bun/turbo workspace. The runnable code ships here; a LIVE end-to-end receive needs this process DEPLOYED + an escrow key PROVISIONED on an always-on host (deploy follow-up, outside CI). DO NOT auto-deploy.
